title: Cooler Culinary Cake Crafting
description: Replaces the Cake-making process with a more realistic one.
body:
# Cooler Culinary Cake Crafting (what a literal mouthful):

The old, unrealistic crafting recipe for Cake is removed, now you need to go through a more realistic, multi-step process to make a Cake

Here is the list of items you will need to make one Cake:

- 5 Eggs
- 2 Milk Buckets, _(or 1 if you use the same Empty Bucket)_
- 2 Wheat
- 6 Sugar
- 2 Bowls, _(or 1 if you use the same Bowl)_
- 1 Sweet Berries
- A Crafting Table, _(to craft the Bowl of Cake Batter and Bowl of Frosting)_
- A Furnace or Smoker, _(to bake the Bowl of Cake Batter)_
- Enough fuel to smelt something for 10 seconds, _(because that’s how long the Bowl of Cake Batter takes to bake)_
  
With that out of the way, let’s get to it!

**Making a Cake:**

First, you have to make a Bowl of Cake Batter, which is done by combining 3 Eggs, 1 Milk Bucket, 2 Wheat, 2 Sugar, and 1 Bowl in a Crafting Table, and you’ll get the Empty Bucket back.

You then have to bake that Bowl of Cake Batter for 10 seconds to get a Bowl of Unfinished Cake.

Right-clicking this on any surface will place down an Unfinished Cake, and you’ll get the Bowl back.

You then have to make a Bowl of Frosting, which is made by combining 1 Water Bottle, 4 Sugar, 2 Eggs, 1 Milk Bucket and a Bowl in a Crafting Table, and you’ll get the Empty Bucket back.

Right-clicking this on an Unfinished Cake will frost it, and you’ll get the Bowl back.

Finally, you have to right-click it with Sweet Berries to place them on the Frosted Cake, completing it and turning it into a normal Cake.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Once you do this, you’ll get the “The Lie” advancement, which is a Portal reference.

</details>



**Slicing a Cake:**

If you right-click a Cake with any type of Sword from vanilla Minecraft or any mod, your Sword will lose 1 point of durability and you will slice one slice off of the Cake.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

If you do this with any type of Sword stronger than Diamond, you’ll get the “Serious Slicing” advancement.

</details>



**Cake Slice:**

A slice from a Cake, _(duh)_, which is obtained by slicing a Cake with any type of Sword from vanilla Minecraft or any mod.

They can only stack up to 7, since there are 7 slices in 1 Cake, and when eaten you regain 2 points, (or 1 shank), of hunger per slice.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You can also feed them to your pet Wolf, so they can join in on the fun as well! :)

</details>



If instead of eating them, you craft 7 Cake Slices together in a Crafting Table, you can make a full Cake.

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.
